title: gilia virgata var. dasyantha
intro: Gilia virgata var. dasyantha, also known as a variety of the white-topped gilia, is a flowering plant species within the Polemoniaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it has been used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits associated with gilia virgata var. dasyantha include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized for therapeutic purposes.
